channel.title: vscode on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in vscode on SoundsBrown
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: PlatformIO and VS Code
item.description: Setup To create a new project, go to the destination directory and run: pio init -b nanoatmega328 --ide vscode This will create the necessary files, including a platformio.ini which will look like this: [env:nanoatmega328] platform = atmelavr board = nanoatmega328 framework = arduino lib_deps = Wire, SPI, olikraus/U8g2@^2.28.8, Adafruit MCP4725 Libraries The lib_deps field is not created by default and needs to be maintained manually. Use pio lib search (try with -h for available options) to find out by which name a library can be imported.
